ddt:Target.Name: DK0_XBC_v1.2_20200602
ddt:Target.Description:
06/02/2020 Modified ATF Level deterioration Level DATA, Screen INT scenario, Screen ClearDiagnosticInformation.All Add ClearDiagnosticInformation.All request
03/31/2020 Add Soft Version and modified DTC fault types
01/14/2020 Carryover from DK0_XFB_XFF_H79Ph2_J87_HHA_HJD_LJC_X52_XBC_v5.3.xml Modified only for XBC project (Delete other projects)
Control for DK0 (CVT7) Vehicle : XBC Software version : 006C-00A1 January 2020
Dongkwon KIM (dongkwon.kim@renault.com)

Data.Name: BrakeInfoStatus (CAN)
Data.Comment: Brake information status received from ABS

Data.Name: AT_TorqueControlType (CAN)
Data.Comment: Type of torque control performed to the engine

Data.Name: CrankingAuthorization_AT (CAN)
Data.Comment: Autorization by the gearbox for engine to crank

Data.Name: CruiseControlStatus_forTM (CAN)
Data.Comment: Type of cruise control running (speed limiter or cruise control)

Data.Name: ECM_TorqueRequestStatus (CAN)
Data.Comment: Type of torque request sent by gearbox to the engine

Item.Text: Exact torque request cannot be achieved (mesure imprecision)
Transient state preventing torque request realization
Torque request can not be achieved

Data.Name: Line pressure solenoid current
Data.Comment: Current detected value of line pressure solenoid

Data.Name: Secondary pressure solenoid current
Data.Comment: Current detected value of secondary pressure solenoid

Data.Name: Self-learning flag
Data.Comment: Flag that indicates the writing in EEprom is well done

Data.Name: Engine torque
Data.Comment: Actual torque delivered by the engine

Item.Text: Electric Oil Pump - Power supply system Failure
Line Pressure (P/L) Solenoid Failure(shorted to ground)
Primary pully speed sensor failure (at low speed)
Output speed sensor failure (at low speed)
Oil temperature sensor failure(shorted to ground)
Oil temperature sensor failure(opened or shorted to power supply)
Primary pully speed sensor failure (during driving)
Secondary pully speed sensor failure(At low speed)
Lock-up (L/U) Solenoid Failure(opened or shorted to power supply)
Secondary pressure sensor failure (shorted to ground)
Secondary pressure failure (opened or shorted to power supply)
Line Pressure (P/L) Solenoid Failure(opened or shorted to power supply)
High clutch / Reverse clutch (H/R) Solenoid failure - LOW
High clutch / Reverse clutch (H/R) Solenoid failure -HIGH
High clutch / Reverse clutch (H/R) Solenoid failure - Neutral
High clutch / Reverse clutch (H/R) Solenoid failure - Interlock
Secondary pully speed sensor failure(During driving)

Data.Name: Current Failure
Data.Comment: Indicating if the failure is always present or not

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or short circuit to ground
Open circuit or short circuit to power supply

Data.Name: Target step motor displacement
Data.Comment: Desired step motor displacement regarding initial position

Data.Name: AT_MinimumIdleSpeedRequest (CAN)
Data.Comment: Minimum requested value of engine idle speed

Data.Name: Command status of select on/off solenoid
Command status of shift lock solenoid
Lock-up solenoid current
Data.Comment: Current detected value of lock-up solenoid

Data.Name: High clutch & reverse brake solenoid current
Command Current of Line Pressure (PL) Solenoid
Command Current of High/Reverse Clutch (H/R) Solenoid
Command Current of Primary Pressure (PRI) Solenoid
Definition of the supplier production line
Saturated Engine Torque Down Request Value
Normal Engine Torque Down Request Value
Gear engaged in manual mode
Data.Comment: Gear engaged (from 1 to 8) when gearbox running in manual mode

Data.Name: Gear Ratio
Data.Comment: Current gear ratio (primary pulley speed/secondary pulley speed)

Data.Name: ATF Deterioration Level
Data.Comment: This data must be Numeric, 32bits, resolution 1 in CLIP Tool. DDT not suppport 32bits Numeric.

Data.Name: RoutineEntryStatus_1
Data.Comment: Routine entry status for recive data

Request.Name: Write date of last after-sales operation
Read date of last after-sales operation

DataItem.Name: Definition of the supplier production line

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

DataItem.Name: High clutch & reverse brake solenoid current

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic session selector in DDT2000 tool-Spec A

Request.Name: Report Current Control of Line Pressure (PL) Solenoid

DataItem.Name: Command Current of Line Pressure (PL) Solenoid

Request.Name: Report Current Control of Lock-up (L/U) Solenoid
Report Current Control of Shift Lock Solenoid

DataItem.Name: Command status of shift lock solenoid

Request.Name: Report Current Control of Primary Pressure (PRI) Solenoid

DataItem.Name: Command Current of Primary Pressure (PRI) Solenoid

Request.Name: Report Current Control of High/Reverse Clutch (H/R) Solenoid

DataItem.Name: Command Current of High/Reverse Clutch (H/R) Solenoid

Request.Name: Report Current Control of Low-Brake (L/B) Solenoid

DataItem.Name: Saturated Engine Torque Down Request Value
Normal Engine Torque Down Request Value

Device.Name: Low Brake (L/B) Solenoid Failure
Device.Mnemonic: LFailOUT1 bit 4 / LFailOUT1 bit 5 / LFailOUT2 bit 7 / LFailOUT4 bit 7

Device.Name: High/Reverse clutch (H/R) Solenoid Failure
Device.Mnemonic: LFailOUT1 bit 0 / LFailOUT1 bit 1 / LFailOUT2 bit 3 / LFailOUT4 bit 6

Device.Name: Electric Oil Pump - Power supply system Failure
Oil temperature sensor failure(shorted to ground)
Oil temperature sensor failure(opened or shorted to power supply)
Primary pully speed sensor failure (at low speed)
Primary pully speed sensor failure (during driving)
Output speed sensor failure (at low speed)
Lock-up (L/U) Solenoid Failure(opened or shorted to power supply)
Secondary pressure sensor failure (shorted to ground)
Secondary pressure failure (opened or shorted to power supply)
Line Pressure (P/L) Solenoid Failure(shorted to ground)
Line Pressure (P/L) Solenoid Failure(opened or shorted to power supply)
High clutch / Reverse clutch (H/R) Solenoid failure - LOW
High clutch / Reverse clutch (H/R) Solenoid failure -HIGH
High clutch / Reverse clutch (H/R) Solenoid failure - Neutral
High clutch / Reverse clutch (H/R) Solenoid failure - Interlock
Secondary pully speed sensor failure(During driving)
Secondary pully speed sensor failure(At low speed)

Display.DataName: Definition of the supplier production line

Label.Text: When ignition is switched ON, put gear lever in R position and slightly push accel pedal
Turn ignition OFF and wait at least 10 seconds
Switch ignition ON (lever always in Parking position) and wait until the flag displays "performed"
Automatic self-learning at ignition switched ON
Warning : it's not possible to check the writing of values in EEPROM
Switch ignition OFF again and wait at least 3 seconds, at next ignition ON the DK0-001 system is operational
The self-learning is automatically performed 3 seconds after ignition beginning
When neutral control learning has been completed, the flag below displays "Completed".

Display.DataName: High clutch & reverse brake solenoid current

Label.Text: This screen allow to ignore ABS malfunction due to run on dynamo bench with rear wheels fixed
If the screen isn't displayed in real time, you can use manual reporting request
Don't forget to initialize screen with green button then start reading

Button.Text: To ignore ABS malfunction, to get normal lock-up behavior
To come back to complete diagnostic (normal status)

Label.Text: You can stop a permanent control before its safety end (5 seconds) using stop button
Using following buttons, linear solenoids are commanded to 400mA

Send.RequestName: Report Current Control of Lock-up (L/U) Solenoid
Report Current Control of Line Pressure (PL) Solenoid
Report Current Control of Primary Pressure (PRI) Solenoid
Report Current Control of Low-Brake (L/B) Solenoid
Report Current Control of Shift Lock Solenoid
Report Current Control of Shift Lock Solenoid
Report Current Control of Shift Lock Solenoid
Report Current Control of Shift Lock Solenoid
Report Current Control of Shift Lock Solenoid
Report Current Control of Shift Lock Solenoid
Report Current Control of Shift Lock Solenoid
Report Current Control of High/Reverse Clutch (H/R) Solenoid
Report Current Control of Shift Lock Solenoid

Display.DataName: Command Current of High/Reverse Clutch (H/R) Solenoid
Display.RequestName: Report Current Control of High/Reverse Clutch (H/R) Solenoid
Report Current Control of Lock-up (L/U) Solenoid
Report Current Control of Low-Brake (L/B) Solenoid

Display.DataName: Command Current of Primary Pressure (PRI) Solenoid
Display.RequestName: Report Current Control of Primary Pressure (PRI) Solenoid

Display.DataName: Command status of shift lock solenoid
Display.RequestName: Report Current Control of Shift Lock Solenoid

Display.DataName: Command Current of Line Pressure (PL) Solenoid
Display.RequestName: Report Current Control of Line Pressure (PL) Solenoid

Label.Text: After G-Sensor replacement, you need to initialize it to "zero" value
Turn ignition switch ON, engine OFF, vehicle at standstill, shift lever in P, brake pedal pressed
